title: Craftable Chainmail Armour Recipe
body:
# Craftable Chailmail Armour

**Forge the Forgotten Armor Chainmail**

The mysterious middle child of Minecraft armor. You can’t craft it in vanilla, and you rarely find it. This datapack changes that — letting you forge your own set of medieval drip, no zombie generosity required.

Note: “Chainmail Armor Recipes” are custom recipes added by the datapack.For more Datapack check out the links at end of description.

**🧠 Why It’s Better **
Because style and strategy shouldn’t be locked behind randomness. Whether you're roleplaying a knight, building a PvP arena, or just want armor that looks cooler than leather but less flashy than diamond, this pack gives you the gear — your way.

**📦 How to Use:**
  
1.  Download the .zip
    
2.  Drop it into your world’s datapacks/ folder
   
3.  Type /reload in-game
  
4.  Craft your chainmail set and suit up
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
